Package com.saxonica.config.pe

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    ConfigurationReaderPE
    Subclass of ConfigurationReader providing functionality particular to Saxon Professional Edition
    DynamicLoaderPE
    Specialization of DynamicLoader for use in Saxon-PE
    ICUNumberer_de
    A numberer for German using the ICU features, which supports variable ordinal suffixing, e.g.
    ICUNumberer_en
    A numberer for English, using the ICU features, which can be set to produce space-separated word numbers, e.g.
    ICUNumbererPE
    A numberer using the ICU features, used principally for formatting numbers as words and day/month names Created by jwl on 11/03/14.
    StyleNodeFactoryPE
    Class StyleNodeFactoryPE: Subclass of StyleNodeFactory used for Saxon-PE.
